title: holcus avenaceus
intro: Holcus avenaceus, also known as common false brome or meadow brome, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Holcus avenaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Holcus avenaceus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
